characters.name: Casey Klein
characters.description: Casey KleinBiographyFull NameCasey KleinStatusSingleGenderFemaleRelativesUnnamed parentsOccupationParty Down EmployeeSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3First Appearance1.01:"Willow Canyon Homeowners Annual Party"Last Appearance3.6:"Sepulveda Basin High School Spring Play Opening Night"Portrayed byLizzy CaplanCasey Kleinis a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theStarzsitcomParty Down. She works forParty Down Cateringand becomes close withHenry Pollard. Pretty, smart, funny, and insecure, Casey returns from her stint as a cruise line comic, ready to jump into her old life as “a comedienne that happens to make ends meet as a cater-waiter.” When her career takes a promising new turn, she’s ready to focus back on the important things, like teaming up with Henry to chastise their tactless co-workers. characters.name: Constance Carmell
characters.description: Constance CarmellBiographyStatusIn a relationshipGenderFemaleRelativesUnnamed parentsOccupationParty Down EmployeeSeries InformationSeasons1•2First Appearance1.01:"Willow Canyon Homeowners Annual Party"Last Appearance2.10:"Constance Carmell Wedding"Portrayed byJane LynchConstance Carmellis a main character in thefirstand a guest in thesecondseason of theStarzsitcomParty Down. Constance is a middle aged woman, with pale skin and blue eyes. She has bleach blonde hair that is straight and kept short. Constance is tall with an average build and is often seen in her work uniform; a button down white shirt, black slacks, dress shoes and a pink bow tie. Outside of work she dresses similar, with button down shirts and loose fitting pants.

characters.name: Henry Pollard
characters.description: Henry PollardBiographyStatusIn a relationshipGenderMaleRelativesUnnamed parentsOccupationParty Down EmployeeSeries InformationSeasons1•2First Appearance1.01:"Willow Canyon Homeowners Annual Party"Last Appearance2.10:"Constance Carmell Wedding"Portrayed byAdam ScottHenry Pollardis the main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theStarzsitcomParty Down. He is a retired actor who joins the Party Down team and forms a bond withCasey Klein. Henry's dream was acting and he went into the business right out of college. After getting his break out roll he thought things were looking up, but as his acting career stalled he decided to quit the business. Calling up one of hisold college friends, he hooks him up with a job atParty Down Catering. Henry, in his mid-thirties and just officially quit acting, is stuck in the middle-management job of his realigned dreams. As the new Team Leader of Party Down, Henry has to reconcile his increased paycheck with the mundane responsibilities of leading a group of workers who snicker at the mention of “professionalism.” He’s officially made the switch from dreams to practicality, but will it stick? characters.name: Kyle Bradway
characters.description: Kyle BradwayBiographyStatusSingleGenderMaleRelativesUnnamed parentsOccupationParty Down EmployeeSeries InformationSeasons1•2First Appearance1.01:"Willow Canyon Homeowners Annual Party"Last Appearance2.10:"Constance Carmell Wedding"Portrayed byRyan HansenKyle Bradwayis a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theStarzsitcomParty Down. Actor, model and front man for the tragically earnest indie alt-band Karma Rocket, Kyle is just killing time at Party Down before his inevitable big break arrives. In his own mind, he's the “total package” -- handsome, talented, sensitive, and “deep” -- a rare combination of soulful artist and insightful intellectual. To everyone else, Kyle is a self-obsessed naïf whose success in the “handsome business” seems all too disturbingly likely. characters.name: Lydia Dunfree
characters.description: Lydia DunfreeBiographyStatusSingleGenderFemaleRelativesUnnamed parentsEscapade(daughter)OccupationParty Down EmployeeSeries InformationSeasons1•2First Appearance2.01:"Jackal Onassis Backstage Party"Last Appearance2.10:"Constance Carmell Wedding"Portrayed byMegan MullallyLydia Dunfreeis a main character in thesecondseason of theStarzsitcomParty Down. Having left behind her loutish husband, Lydia has arrived in Hollywood with a single goal -- achieving stardom for her 13-year-old daughter Escapade. Eternally optimistic and naive, earnest and straight-talking, Lydia is delighted to find herself working alongside the “entertainment professionals” at Party Down, and eagerly cultivates their wisdom and advice about “making it” in show biz.

characters.name: Roman DeBeers
characters.description: Roman DeBeersBiographyStatusSingleGenderMaleRelativesUnnamed parentsOccupationParty Down EmployeeSeries InformationSeasons1•2First Appearance1.01:"Willow Canyon Homeowners Annual Party"Last Appearance2.10:"Constance Carmell Wedding"Portrayed byMartin StarrRoman DeBeersis a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theStarzsitcomParty Down. He is a screenwriter who is working as aParty Down Cateringemployee while awaiting his big break. A self-proclaimed Sci-Fi visionary and all-purpose intellectual and critic, Roman remains ever-frustrated that his obvious talent continues to go unrecognized while lesser beings like Kyle are groomed for stardom. His weapon against the fundamental un-fairness of the universe is his relentless judgment of others – his colleagues, the party guests, whoever crosses his field of vision. The only one spared is Casey, with whom he is secretly (and forever unrequitedly) in love. characters.name: Ron Donald
characters.description: Ron DonaldBiographyStatusSingleGenderMaleRelativesUnnamed parentsOccupationParty Down ManagerSeries InformationSeasons1•2First Appearance1.01:"Willow Canyon Homeowners Annual Party"Last Appearance2.10:"Constance Carmell Wedding"Portrayed byKen MarinoRon Donaldis a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theStarzsitcomParty Down. He works forParty Down Cateringand went to college withHenry Pollard. Nine months ago Ron was off to live his dream, owning his own Soup R’ Crackers, an all you can eat salad and soup franchise. Now he’s back, the spitting image of Ron Donald success; nice hair, nice car and trophy girlfriend...only it’s all falling apart. His business has gone under and his girlfriend is bleeding him dry. His final hope is somehow getting his old catering job back from Henry, the only problem is, its Henry’s job he wants.
